cues.title: Intro: Stop Prompt Roulette
cues.show: Hard cut to clean ARV loop, dark analog archive texture, sparse composition, big text STOP PROMPT ROULETTE.
cues.message: Hyroglyphs is a story-first creative AI studio for @audioreworkvisions, built to generate repeatable, coherent visual worlds for techno releases and livestreams.

cues.title: Start with narrative
cues.show: Screen recording New Release start screen, click Create from Story, overlay Start with narrative not prompts.
cues.message: Instead of one-off images, we turn a concept into structured scene beats you can iterate, remix, and extend.

cues.title: Audience framing
cues.show: Audience slide Built for Hackathon Judges and Builders, subtext Repeatability plus grounding plus proof via demo.
cues.message: This demo focuses on end-to-end pipeline, remix continuity, and packaging automation.

cues.title: Pipeline 1: Concept
cues.show: Demo part 1, Generate or Refine Story Concept panel, concept paragraph appears, overlay 1 Concept.
cues.message: Step 1: Generate or refine a story concept for the release.

cues.title: Pipeline 2: Scene beats
cues.show: Click Break into Scene Beats, structured Beat 1 to Beat 6 list appears, overlay 2 Scene beats.
cues.message: Step 2: Convert story into scene beats, a plan you can reuse.

cues.title: Pipeline 3: Grounding
cues.show: Grounding view with Foundry IQ and Local ARV Knowledge toggles, overlay Grounded to ARV aesthetic with style bullets.
cues.message: Step 3: Ground creative intent using Foundry IQ plus curated channel knowledge so outputs stay on-brand.

cues.title: Pipeline 4: Render
cues.show: Render screen, click Render Scenes, progress indicators, reveal four loopable GIF scenes in a grid, overlay Render to 4 loopable GIFs.
cues.message: Step 4: Render stillframes, sketches, and loopable GIF scenes ready for iteration.

cues.title: Assemble slideshow
cues.show: Click Assemble Slideshow, preview continuous GIF slideshow as visual source, overlay One-click video layer output.
cues.message: Result: concept to plan to 4 loops to slideshow, ready for a music video or livestream.

cues.title: Remix flow start
cues.show: Demo part 2, open Existing Release selector and choose a prior release, overlay Remix without losing continuity.
cues.message: Now we remix: take an existing release story and scenes and extend the same world.

cues.title: Remix pack continuity
cues.show: Click Generate Remix Pack, new loops appear beside originals in A/B layout, overlay Continuity preserved.
cues.message: Hyroglyphs creates new loops that stay coherent, no restarting from scratch.

cues.title: Structured iteration
cues.show: Iteration UI with buttons Remix, Extend Beat, Variant with constraints, overlay Iterate via flows not re-prompts.
cues.message: The key shift: iteration is structured. Remix and extend flows replace random re-prompting.

cues.title: Thumbnail studio
cues.show: Demo part 3, open Thumbnail Studio, generated thumbnail draft with title, description, hashtags, SEO keywords, overlay Packaging grounded to same story.
cues.message: Finally, Thumbnail Studio generates the release package: thumbnail, metadata, and SEO, grounded in the same narrative and style.

cues.title: System architecture
cues.show: Architecture diagram slide: Inputs Story plus ARV Knowledge plus Foundry IQ to Scene Planner to Renderer to Loop Assembler to Thumbnail Studio.
cues.message: Under the hood, this is a repeatable production system: narrative to structure to grounded generation to loop outputs to packaging.

cues.title: Impact and placeholders
cues.show: Impact slide with tiles Speed, Consistency, Scale and placeholders for hours saved per release, releases per week, iteration count.
cues.message: Impact: faster shipping, consistent visual identity, and a workflow that scales beyond ARV to other electronic music channels.
